whatsapp.message: Hi, I'm interested in PCE BV engineering and project controls services.

about.heroDescription: Netherlands-led governance with India-based engineering execution support for industrial EPC projects.
about.interfaceStatement: An interface between governance, coordination, and execution.
about.timelineDescription: From engineering legacy to structured global EPC delivery.
about.expertise: Project Controls Leadership, Program Management, Contract and Financial Governance, Risk Analysis, and Multicultural Team Development.
about.p1: PCE BV is a trusted provider of engineering, procurement, and construction support services, specialized in detail engineering, project controls, and documentation.
about.p2: Founded and registered with KVK on 30 April 2025, PCE BV is co-founded by Kiran V. Kulkarni and Nishikant V. Choudhary.
about.p3: Our mission is to deliver engineering excellence in the simplest and most effective way while ensuring compliance with international standards.
about.p4: With over three decades of EPC and project controls expertise, we support chemicals, petrochemicals, energy, and infrastructure clients with disciplined delivery.

project-controls.title: Project Controls Leadership
project-controls.desc: Integrated cost, planning, risk, and change management for complex industrial projects.

planning-scheduling.title: Planning & Scheduling
planning-scheduling.desc: Level 3/Level 4 detail schedules with resource planning and critical path management.

cost-controls.title: Cost & Budget Controls
cost-controls.desc: Total installed cost estimation, budget management, and variance analysis.

risk-management.title: Risk & Opportunity Management
risk-management.desc: Identification, assessment, and mitigation of project risks with opportunity capture.

change-management.title: Change & Configuration Management
change-management.desc: Disciplined change control processes and configuration baseline management.

project-governance.title: Project Governance & Reporting
project-governance.desc: Stakeholder reporting, steering committee support, and governance frameworks.

detail-engineering.title: Detail Engineering Services
detail-engineering.desc: Multi-discipline engineering from FEED through IFC with high-quality deliverables.

process-engineering.title: Process Engineering
process-engineering.desc: Process design, flowsheets, and PID development for chemical and energy projects.

piping-engineering.title: Piping Engineering & Stress Analysis
piping-engineering.desc: 3D piping models, isometrics, and stress analysis for integrity and safety.

mechanical-engineering.title: Mechanical Engineering
mechanical-engineering.desc: Mechanical equipment design, sizing, and specification for rotating and static equipment.

electrical-engineering.title: Electrical & Control Engineering
electrical-engineering.desc: Electrical system design, load calculations, and instrumentation & control specifications.

civil-structural.title: Civil & Structural Engineering
civil-structural.desc: Structural design, foundation analysis, and site civil works for industrial facilities.

3d-plant-modeling.title: 3D Plant Modeling & Visualization
3d-plant-modeling.desc: Comprehensive 3D plant models for coordination, clash detection, and constructability review.

procurement-construction.title: Procurement & Construction Support
procurement-construction.desc: Vendor coordination, field engineering, and construction-stage support.

documentation-governance.title: Documentation & Governance
documentation-governance.desc: Document control, technical reporting, and project governance documentation.

commissioning-support.title: Commissioning & Start-Up Support
commissioning-support.desc: Commissioning planning, readiness support, and start-up assistance.

products.heading: Engineering and Controls Solutions
products.subheading: Integrated offerings for detail engineering, project controls, and EPC support.

founder.bio: Accomplished project controls and program management leader with 32+ years of expertise in planning, risk, cost, and change management across major industrial projects.

founder-nishikant.bio: Experienced leader in project controls and program management with 32+ years of expertise in planning, risk, cost, and change management for major energy, chemicals, and infrastructure projects across Europe, the Middle East, and Asia.

founder-kiran.bio: Strategic engineering leader with deep expertise in multi-discipline execution, process engineering, and project delivery. Leads PCE PL Mumbai operations and coordinates execution excellence across EPC programs.
